machine_detail.machine_description: A series of oil-less (dry) rotary vane displacement pumps designed for industrial vacuum applications. These pumps use self-lubricating carbon vanes and require periodic maintenance of filters, vanes, and bearings.

maintenance.task: Check and clean air intake filter. Replace if clogged.
Replace air intake filter annually, regardless of condition.
Inspect vanes for minimum height, improper wear, or chipping.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for KVT/KDT 3.60
spare_parts.description: Comprehensive kit for routine maintenance. Includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for DVT 3.60
spare_parts.description: Comprehensive kit for routine maintenance. Includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Carbon Vane Set
spare_parts.description: Critical wear part included in maintenance kits. Replace when worn to minimum height.

spare_parts.name: Air Intake Filter
spare_parts.description: Standard wear part included in maintenance kits. Replace frequently.

spare_parts.name: Dust Separation Cartridge
spare_parts.description: Internal filter element replaced during major service.

spare_parts.name: Filter Housing Rubber Gasket
spare_parts.description: Seals the filter housing. Can be damaged during filter changes, causing vacuum/pressure loss.
